_description: Oracle OMEGA — THE validated optimum. oracle_1 + chrono blocks + chrono boosts + overnight skip (12-5 ET) + rolling 8-trade cumulative loss halt (-$400, 60min cooldown). FIRST architecture to pass all 4 VIABLE thresholds (R²≥0.85, 6h+≥75%, w6h≥-$500, Cal≥2.0) AND survive temporal holdout validation. Backtest: $+13,842 / R²=0.969 / 6h+=97.9% / w6h=-$344 / Cal=7.60 across 256 trades.
